parameters.query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.client, c.piid, c.ceiling, c.funded, c.fy_revenue, c.pop_end, c.status, c.pm, c.naics, (c.pop_end::date - CURRENT_DATE) as days_until_expiry, CASE WHEN (c.pop_end::date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 180 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN (c.pop_end::date - CURRENT_DATE) <= 365 THEN 'HIGH' ELSE 'WATCH' END as urgency, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker ot WHERE ot.title ILIKE '%' || split_part(c.name, ' ', 1) || '%' AND ot.stage NOT IN ('Won','Lost','No-Go')) as existing_pursuits FROM gda_active_contracts c WHERE c.pop_end IS NOT NULL AND c.pop_end::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE + 180 AND CURRENT_DATE + 548 AND c.status = 'active' ORDER BY c.pop_end::date ASC;

INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (title, agency, dept, stage, gda_label, estimated_value, naics_code, source_url, notes, created_at, updated_at) SELECT 'RECOMPETE: ' || {{ $json.contract_name }}, {{ $json.client || $json.contract_name }}, {{ $json.client || $json.contract_name }}, 'Identified', 'EVALUATE', {{ ($json.fy_revenue || $json.ceiling || 0) }}::numeric, {{ $json.naics || '' }}, 'internal://recompete-alert', 'Auto-generated recompete alert. Expires: ' || {{ $json.pop_end }} || '. PM: ' || {{ $json.pm || 'Unassigned' }}, NOW(), NOW() WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gda_opportunity_tracker ot WHERE ot.title ILIKE '%' || split_part({{ $json.contract_name }}, ' ', 1) || '%' AND ot.stage NOT IN ('Won','Lost','No-Go')) RETURNING id, title;

parameters.text:
={{ '⚠️ *RECOMPETE ALERT*
' + ($json.urgency === 'CRITICAL' ? '🔴' : '🟡') + ' *' + $json.contract_name + '*
Client: ' + ($json.client||'N/A') + '
Expires: ' + $json.pop_end + ' (' + $json.days_until_expiry + ' days)
Value: $' + (($json.fy_revenue||$json.ceiling||0)/1000000).toFixed(1) + 'M/yr
PM: ' + ($json.pm||'Unassigned') + '

' + ($json.has_active_pursuit ? '✅ Pursuit exists' : '❌ NO PURSUIT — auto-creating') + '

' + $json.recommended_action }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_intelligence_log (category, finding, source, agency, created_at) VALUES ('recompete', {{ $json.recommended_action }}, 'recompete-early-warning', {{ $json.client || $json.contract_name }}, NOW())

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'No recompetes in 6-18 month watch window', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];
